description_long: This is a modern, two-story house set within a landscaped rectangular lot surrounded by a low boundary wall. The house features a flat roof, large rectangular windows, and a clean, white facade, with a prominent driveway leading to a double garage. The property includes a spacious backyard with a swimming pool, patio area, and a small outbuilding or shed. The grounds are dotted with a variety of trees, shrubs, and flowerbeds, providing a lush, suburban feel. The main entrance is accentuated by a black overhang and is accessible via a paved path, while the rear of the house opens onto the pool and garden area. The overall design emphasizes open outdoor spaces and a functional, contemporary layout.
description: A modern, two-story white house with a flat roof, large windows, and a landscaped yard featuring a pool, patio, and driveway. The property is surrounded by trees, shrubs, and a low boundary wall.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with a black overhang, large windows, and the driveway leading to the garage, framed by landscaped greenery.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the backyard with a swimming pool, patio, and garden, as well as the back facade of the house and a small outbuilding.
description_view_2: Driveway and garage view, emphasizing the double garage doors, main entry path, and the symmetrical arrangement of trees and flowerbeds along the front boundary.
description_view_3: Back corner view showing the pool, patio, and side garden, with steps leading up to the rear entry and a clear view of the flat roof and upper terrace.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry features a black overhang, wide steps, and a simple modern door, with no porch or columns.
